task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim graphical user interface is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add a proximity sensor to the CoppeliaSim scene
task_completion.visual_evidence: A proximity sensor object is visible in the CoppeliaSim scene hierarchy (left panel) or in the 3D viewport, indicating the agent is building the configuration from an empty scene.

task_completion.description: Evaluate the proximity sensor at 5 or more candidate mounting positions
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of multiple sensor placements being tested, such as a Lua/Python script in an editor with loop logic for placements, CoppeliaSim console output showing multiple evaluations, or multiple sensor objects in the scene.

task_completion.description: Save the per-placement measurement records to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_coverage.csv containing at least 5 rows of placement data.

task_completion.description: Save the comparison report with the recommended location to a JSON file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_analysis.json containing the recommended location based on maximum coverage.

integrity.description: The agent actually used CoppeliaSim to generate the data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the CoppeliaSim GUI or its internal scripting environment, rather than just writing a standalone Python script that mocks the output files without running a simulation.

integrity.description: The output files contain realistic simulation data
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV and JSON files show varying coverage values and realistic coordinates, not just dummy, identical, or placeholder values (e.g., all 0.0 or 1.0).

integrity.description: The agent did not simply echo hardcoded text into the output files
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands like 'echo "{...}" > sensor_analysis.json' that bypass the actual simulation and evaluation process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the agent to synthetically generate a robot sensor configuration in CoppeliaSim from an empty scene. The agent must test exactly 5 or more placements. The CSV file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_coverage.csv and contain at least 5 rows of placement data. The JSON file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sensor_analysis.json and include the recommended location based on the maximum coverage.
